summary: Commission Feature Testing Complete - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: Commission page fully functional with edit rules, month selector, charts, and table. Sidebar commission link under HR group working.
passed_tests: ✓ Backend: GET /api/settings/commission-rules returns 3 default tiers (base/standard/excellent)
✓ Backend: Commission rules default values verified (base 3%, standard 5%, excellent 8%)
✓ Backend: PUT /api/settings/commission-rules updates rules successfully
✓ Backend: GET /api/reports/commission returns employee commission data
✓ Backend: Commission report has all required fields (employee_id, name, role, sales, target, progress, rate, tier, commission)
✓ Backend: Commission report month selector works (tested 2026-03, 2026-02)
✓ Backend: Commission calculation verified (sales * rate%)
✓ Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-commission returns daily employee sales data
✓ Backend: Daily commission has required fields (employee_name, sales, count, estimated_commission)
✓ Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-settlement endpoint working
✓ Frontend: Commission page loads with data-testid='commission-page'
✓ Frontend: Commission rules cards show 3 tiers (基础 3%, 达标 5%, 超额 8%)
✓ Frontend: Month selector works - changes data when month changed
✓ Frontend: Edit rules button opens editable inputs for tier progress% and rate%
✓ Frontend: Save rules button persists changes (toast shows '更新成功')
✓ Frontend: Total commission summary card ($9.28 for March 2026)
✓ Frontend: Bar chart shows top employees by commission (员工提成 TOP 10)
✓ Frontend: Commission table shows columns: #, 员工管理, role, 销售额, 销售目标, 完成率, 等级, 提成比例, 员工提成
✓ Frontend: Commission link in sidebar under HR group (员工管理 -> 员工提成)
✓ Frontend: Daily Settlement page loads with date/store selectors
✓ Frontend: Daily commission section conditionally renders when sales data exists

features_verified.commission_page: PASS - /admin/commission shows rules cards, monthly table, chart
features_verified.commission_rules_edit: PASS - Edit button enables inputs, Save persists to backend
features_verified.month_selector: PASS - Changing month updates commission data
features_verified.bar_chart: PASS - Top 10 employees chart displays correctly
features_verified.daily_commission_section: PASS - Integrated in DailySettlementPage, shows when data exists
features_verified.sidebar_commission_link: PASS - Located under 员工管理 group as 员工提成

seed_data_creation: Used existing sales data - admin user has $116 in sales for March 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/settings/commission-rules (GET/PUT), /api/reports/commission?month=YYYY-MM (GET), /api/reports/daily-commission?date=YYYY-MM-DD (GET). Commission page at /admin/commission has editable rules, monthly employee table, and bar chart. Daily commission section shows in daily settlement page when employees have sales. Sidebar link under 员工管理 group.

commission_feature_details.progress_formula: progress = (sales / target) * 100, or 100% if no target and has sales
commission_feature_details.sidebar_location: 员工管理 -> 员工提成
